title: sprengelia micrantha
intro: Sprengelia micrantha, also known as the New England sundew or green sundew, is a low-growing, carnivorous plant native to eastern North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its use as a treatment for various skin conditions, such as acne, eczema, and dermatitis, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sprengelia micrantha include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy for skin care. Herbal preparations of Sprengelia micrantha typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves, which can be used topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
